title: Ubiquiti USL-Entry, UniFi Protect magnetic door contact
description: The Ubiquiti USL-Entry is a wireless UniFi Protect sensor designed to monitor the open/closed status of doors and windows . It communicates with the gateway using the proprietary SuperLink protocol with range of up to 2km (in open space). Both the sensor and the magnet can be easily attached using adhesive or screws to walls, doors or windows. The sensor is powered by a CR123A battery (included) with battery life of up to 6 years
